items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主导因子：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→纳斯达克/标普500承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金更易回撤；VIX上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX抬升→偏纳斯达克/标普500先空后看、黄金偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX回落→偏纳斯达克/标普500修复反弹、黄金喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Stocks Rally as President Trump Eases Iran Threats…
- 宏观/Fed线索：Circle heads for it worst day on record as proposed law could limit stab…

items.title: 石油价格下跌，股指期货上涨，据报道美国已向伊朗提议停火
items.summary: 全球石油价格暴跌，美国股市期货价格上涨。据报道，美国通过中间人巴基斯坦向伊朗传递了结束中东冲突的15点计划，这场冲突已经持续了四周。
items.title_en: Oil prices fall, stock futures climb on reports U.S. has proposed a cease-fire to Iran
items.summary_en: Global oil prices tumbled and U.S. stock futures rose on Tuesday evening following reports that the U.S., via intermediary Pakistan, had sent Iran a 15-point plan to end the conflict in the Middle East, now in its fourth week.

items.summary_en: "Operation Epic Fury continues unabated" to achieve President Donald Trump's military objectives, White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said.

items.summary_en: Iran appears to have adopted a “calibrated strategy” in the Strait of Hormuz — allowing only certain vessels to pass through the crucial waterway.

items.title: 美军 reportedly 计划部署 3,000 名士兵到中东地区，油价上涨近 5%

items.title_en: Pentagon reportedly plans to deploy 3,000 troops to the Middle East, lifting oil prices by nearly 5%
items.summary_en: Oil futures climbed by nearly 5% Tuesday, with global prices settling above $104 a barrel following a report that the Pentagon plans to deploy an airborne Army unit to the Middle East to support its operations against Iran — signaling that the situation in the region is poised to intensify.

items.title: 科威特称霍尔木兹海峡关闭将是灾难性的，会引发全球经济的连锁反应。

items.title_en: Kuwait says Strait of Hormuz closure is beyond catastrophic, will trigger domino effect across global economy
items.summary_en: Iran is holding the world economy hostage by blockading the Strait of Hormuz, said Sheikh Nawaf al-Sabah, the CEO of Kuwait Petroleum Corp.
